name: Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a microwave-safe dish large enough for all ingredients for about 2 minutes.
2. Peel the washed lemons using a potato peeler, removing the zest and grating it along with the sugar into a food processor until finely chopped.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (eggs, egg yolk, and the grated lemon mixture) to the food processor and blend thoroughly.
4. Transfer the mixture back into the dish and return it to the microwave. Cook on high for about 5 minutes, checking frequently to avoid overcooking. Stir every minute to prevent curdling.
5. The curd is ready when it thickens enough to coat the back of a wooden spoon.
6. Allow the curd to cool before transferring into glass jars and sealing. Store in the refrigerator once opened.
7. Serve on bread or toast, mixed with whipped cream for cake fillings, or use as desired. Makes about 1 pound.
